user.title: Select Jablotron panel
user.description: Multiple Jablotron panels were found. Select the one to configure.

confirm.title: Confirm Jablotron panel
confirm.description:
**Panel:** {name}
**Device:** `{path}`
**Serial:** `{serial}`

Home Assistant will briefly open the device to verify permissions and exclusive access. Make sure JA-Link / F-Link is closed before continuing.

data_description.service_pin: Service/installer PIN for reading device and section names from the panel. Leave empty to use generic names.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Jablotron panel
reconfigure.description: Select the panel this integration should control.

data_description.service_pin: Service/installer PIN for reading device and section names from the panel. Leave empty to use generic names.

abort.no_device: No Jablotron panel found on USB. Make sure the panel is connected and JA-Link / F-Link is closed.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single Jablotron Local instance is supported.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: The selected panel does not match the configured one (different serial number).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to communicate with the panel. Check the connection and the Home Assistant logs.
error.device_not_found: The panel device disappeared before setup could complete. Reconnect the cable and try again.
error.permission_denied: Home Assistant cannot access the panel device. Verify that the process has read/write permission on the hidraw character device.
error.device_busy: The panel is held by another process (typically JA-Link or F-Link). Close it and try again.

code_required.message: A code is required to arm or disarm the alarm.

wrong_code.message: The panel rejected the code. Verify your PIN is correct.

command_failed.message: The command failed. The panel did not respond in time.
